subject: M crashes when going to bin 1
body:
Hi all,

I consistently get this error when trying to extract subvolumes at bin 1. I 
have done this before without problems and dont have it when I extract at 
bin 2. 

Any suggestions would be greatly appreciated. 
04/22/2023 18:06:56:
System.Exception: System.Runtime.InteropServices.SEHException (0x80004005): 
External component has thrown an exception.

Hamid
